heading: Definitions
label: 741 Definitions
notes: Amendments2007—Pars. (2) to (14). added pars. (2) and (12) to (14) and redesignated former pars. (2) to (10) as (3) to (11), respectively.Pub. L. 110–53
amendments: Amendments2007—Pars. (2) to (14). added pars. (2) and (12) to (14) and redesignated former pars. (2) to (10) as (3) to (11), respectively.Pub. L. 110–53

children.heading: Capability
children.label: 1 Capability
children.text: The term “capability” means the ability to provide the means to accomplish one or more tasks under specific conditions and to specific performance standards. A capability may be achieved with any combination of properly planned, organized, equipped, trained, and exercised personnel that achieves the intended outcome.

children.heading: Credentialed; credentialing
children.label: 2 Credentialed; credentialing
children.text: The terms “credentialed” and “credentialing” have the meanings given those terms in .section 311 of this title

children.heading: Hazard
children.label: 3 Hazard
children.text: The term “hazard” has the meaning given that term under .section 5195a(a)(1) of title 42

children.heading: Mission assignment
children.label: 4 Mission assignment
children.text: The term “mission assignment” means a work order issued to a Federal agency by the Agency, directing completion by that agency of a specified task and setting forth funding, other managerial controls, and guidance.

children.heading: National preparedness goal
children.label: 5 National preparedness goal
children.text: The term “national preparedness goal” means the national preparedness goal established under .section 743 of this title

children.heading: National preparedness system
children.label: 6 National preparedness system
children.text: The term “national preparedness system” means the national preparedness system established under .section 744 of this title

children.heading: National training program
children.label: 7 National training program
children.text: The term “national training program” means the national training program established under .section 748(a) of this title

children.heading: Operational readiness
children.label: 8 Operational readiness
children.text: The term “operational readiness” means the capability of an organization, an asset, a system, or equipment to perform the missions or functions for which it is organized or designed.

children.heading: Performance measure
children.label: 9 Performance measure
children.text: The term “performance measure” means a quantitative or qualitative characteristic used to gauge the results of an outcome compared to its intended purpose.

children.heading: Performance metric
children.label: 10 Performance metric
children.text: The term “performance metric” means a particular value or characteristic used to measure the outcome that is generally expressed in terms of a baseline and a target.

children.heading: Prevention
children.label: 11 Prevention
children.text: The term “prevention” means any activity undertaken to avoid, prevent, or stop a threatened or actual act of terrorism.

children.heading: Resources
children.label: 12 Resources
children.text: The term “resources” has the meaning given that term in .section 311 of this title

children.heading: Type
children.label: 13 Type
children.text: The term “type” means a classification of resources that refers to the capability of a resource.

children.heading: Typed; typing
children.label: 14 Typed; typing
children.text: The terms “typed” and “typing” have the meanings given those terms in .section 311 of this title
